calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Heather J. Chapdelaine, individually and dba JRC Construction.
Default entered against defendant on January 11, 2008.
Does defendants dismissed on January 11, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing filed March 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Bank of the West and against the Defaulted Defendant HEATHER J. CHAPDELAINE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA JRC CONSTRUCTION as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,125.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,884.52.
Attorney's Fees - $2,884.52.
Costs - $400.00, for a total of $76,909.99.

The Court further Orders that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one 2006 Hyundai 110-7 excavator S/N N30110021, and is entitled to its immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover said property from defendant.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
